name: save_conversation_summary
description: Saves a summary of the current conversation so you can remember it next time the user calls. Call this BEFORE ending every conversation. Write a concise summary (2-3 sentences) of the key astrological topics discussed, insights shared, and any open questions the user had.

user_id.description: The Supabase auth UUID of the user

summary.description: A concise 2-3 sentence summary of this conversation: key topics discussed, insights shared, advice given, and any open questions

topics.description: List of key topic tags, e.g. ['sun-sign', 'career', 'relationships', 'bazi-pillars', 'wuxing-balance']

saved.description: Whether the summary was saved successfully

id.description: The ID of the saved conversation record

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the summary was saved
